## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and terminal output.

- **Node.js version**: (run `node --version`)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
